global.title: Iran president calls on US to end blockade. Follow live updates. - The Boston Globe
global.summary: The Middle East crisis continues to widen, with heavy casualties reported in Iran, Lebanon, Israel and the Gulf, renewed strikes in southern Lebanon, and U.S.-Iran talks appearing to stall in Pakistan.
global.whyItMatters: This remains the clearest live development shaping prayer, preaching, and pastoral care around fear, war, and peace.

global.title: California seeing higher jet fuel prices, experts predict troubled skies for summer travelers - CBS News
global.summary: Rising jet fuel prices tied to the Middle East conflict are beginning to affect travel expectations, with experts warning of a difficult summer for airlines and passengers.
global.whyItMatters: Global conflict is now touching ordinary family budgets and travel plans, offering a concrete way to pastor people through anxiety and uncertainty.

canadian.title: The Uplift: Peanut the puppy - CBS News
canadian.summary: CBS’s latest uplifting feature highlights small acts of care and encouragement, including a story centered on Peanut the puppy.
canadian.whyItMatters: A lighter national-interest story can help balance a heavy news cycle and provide a simple illustration of compassion in community life.

canadian.title: Saturday Sessions: The Milk Carton Kids perform "I'll Go Home From Here" - CBS News
canadian.summary: A fresh music feature offers a reflective cultural moment through a live performance by The Milk Carton Kids.
canadian.whyItMatters: Useful as a gentler conversation point for pastoral connection, especially when many people are weary from conflict-heavy headlines.

local.title: White scores twice, Sabaly adds a goal and Whitecaps beat Rapids 3-1 - ABC News - Breaking News, Latest News and Videos
local.summary: The Vancouver Whitecaps won 3-1 over Colorado, with Brian White scoring twice as the club stretched its strong early-season form and won a fourth straight match.
local.whyItMatters: A positive local sports result gives Kris a simple point of connection with people in the congregation and wider community.

persecutedChurch.title: David Rosen: Israel doesn’t adequately understand Christian relations - The Times of Israel
persecutedChurch.summary: After outrage over the desecration of a Jesus statue in Lebanon, David Rosen argues Israel lacks a serious long-term strategy for relations with churches and the wider Christian world.
persecutedChurch.whyItMatters: This helps frame the deeper issue behind recent incidents affecting Christians in the region and can inform wiser prayer and teaching.

persecutedChurch.title: Settlers reportedly attack Palestinian village in northern West Bank - The Times of Israel
persecutedChurch.summary: Palestinian reports say settlers hurled stones and set property on fire in the West Bank village of Qusra, adding to tensions and insecurity for vulnerable communities.
persecutedChurch.whyItMatters: Pastors should watch for violence that further destabilizes Christian and other minority communities in the Holy Land.

leadership.title: Skarbek’s Ruth Corcoran-Henry on how businesses flexibility can shape success - Consultancy.uk
leadership.summary: Ruth Corcoran-Henry argues that change succeeds when ambition, capability, and the human experience stay aligned, with clear communication and honest questions asked early.
leadership.whyItMatters: A timely leadership reminder for church teams: people handle change better when communication is transparent and participation is real.

goodNews.title: World Press Photo Contest winners cast a lens on resilience, pain and bliss - NPR
goodNews.summary: The World Press Photo winners include images of hardship, but also striking scenes of resilience, rebuilding, beauty, and joy from communities across the Global South.
goodNews.whyItMatters: This offers a hopeful, honest reminder that grace, dignity, and beauty still emerge in troubled places—useful for sermon imagination and pastoral encouragement.
